scripts.build: pnpm run --filter shared build && pnpm run --filter backend build && pnpm run --filter frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm run --filter backend test && pnpm run --filter frontend test
scripts.lint: pnpm run --filter backend lint && pnpm run --filter frontend lint
scripts.smoke:install: pnpm --filter frontend exec playwright install chromium
scripts.smoke: BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 pnpm --filter frontend exec playwright test
scripts.smoke:headed: BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 pnpm --filter frontend exec playwright test --headed
scripts.smoke:ui: BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 pnpm --filter frontend exec playwright test --ui
